steps.title: Use the narrator pattern
steps.content: The text says the novel has three sections, each from a different family member's perspective: Minji's, Dae's, and Nora's. The blank should describe perspectives that are separate from one another.

steps.title: Choose the precise adjective
steps.content: B conflicts with the named perspectives, C suggests the structure was accidental, and D suggests an obligation the passage never mentions. The adjective meaning separate and different fits. The answer is A.
